ddls:
CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "dept_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "dept_name" TEXT /* Name of the department (e.g., Building Education, Planning) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the department */,
  "head_of_department" TEXT /* Name of the head of the department */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the department */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number for the department */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dept_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fee_types" (
  "fee_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fee type */,
  "fee_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the fee type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the fee type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fee_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fees" (
  "fee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fee */,
  "fee_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the fee type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the fee */,
  "quantity" TEXT /* Quantity of the fee */,
  "amount" TEXT /* Amount of the fee */,
  "paid_to_date" TEXT /* Total amount paid to date */,
  "credit_amount" TEXT /* Credit amount applied to the fee */,
  "credit_remark" TEXT /* Remark associated with the credit */,
  "dept_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department responsible for the fee */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fees_fee_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("fee_type_id") REFERENCES fee_types ("fee_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fees_dept_id FOREIGN KEY ("dept_id") REFERENCES departments ("dept_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fee_payments" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment */,
  "fee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the fee being paid */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date the payment was made */,
  "payment_amount" TEXT /* Amount of the payment */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., cash, credit card) */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Status of the payment (e.g., pending, successful, failed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fee_payments_fee_id FOREIGN KEY ("fee_id") REFERENCES fees ("fee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fee_credits" (
  "credit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each credit */,
  "fee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the fee to which the credit is applied */,
  "credit_date" TEXT /* Date the credit was applied */,
  "credit_amount" TEXT /* Amount of the credit */,
  "credit_remark" TEXT /* Remark associated with the credit */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("credit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fee_credits_fee_id FOREIGN KEY ("fee_id") REFERENCES fees ("fee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fee_remarks" (
  "remark_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each remark */,
  "fee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the fee to which the remark is associated */,
  "remark_date" TEXT /* Date the remark was made */,
  "remark_text" TEXT /* Text of the remark */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("remark_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fee_remarks_fee_id FOREIGN KEY ("fee_id") REFERENCES fees ("fee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, viewer) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user to whom the permission is granted */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission (e.g., view_fees, edit_fees) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_permissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
column_names: Name of the department (e.g., Building Education, Planning)
Name of the head of the department
Unique identifier for each fee type
Credit amount applied to the fee
ID of the department responsible for the fee
ID of the fee being paid
Method of payment (e.g., cash, credit card)
Status of the payment (e.g., pending, successful, failed)
ID of the fee to which the credit is applied
ID of the fee to which the remark is associated
Role of the user (e.g., admin, viewer)
ID of the user to whom the permission is granted
Name of the permission (e.g., view_fees, edit_fees)
